ratings.comment: Dr.Patterson is AMAZING! He is such a fun person with plenty of knowledge. Lectures can get a bit boring at times, but not for lack of personality- I just did not find the content interesting or necessary to pay attention to. The projects are very fun, though, with lots of space for creative freedom! He grades extremely generously and cares a lot.
Prof Patterson was the best! This class was super fun and interesting, especially if you're a Digital Studies certificate or interested in marketing, social media, or life sciences.
